title: Loctite APG 20mlx10 UK
features: Quick repairs - The instant adhesive can be used on materials including metal, plastics, elastomers and for porous materials such as wood, paper, leather or textiles
Demanding bonding - The strong super glue adhesive is also suitable for applications requiring uniform stress distribution or high tensile and shear strength
Emergency repairs - The strong liquid glue is ideal for quick emergency repairs. The superglue bonds plastics, metals and a wide variety of material combinations
Clean application - As the instant adhesive is a single component, no mixing is necessary for application. After application, it cures quickly at room temperature
description: Product Description LOCTITE® 401 is a fast curing instant adhesive designed for the assembly of difficult-to-bond materials requiring uniform stress distribution and high tensile and/or shear strength. The product provides for the rapid bonding of a wide range of materials, including metals, plastics and elastomers. LOCTITE 401 is also suited to bonding porous materials such as wood, paper, leather and fabric. Perfect for all quick repairs and all types of small emergency repairs. Box Contains 1 x 20 ml All Purpose Adhesive Manufacturer Contact Information Henkel Limited, Hemel Hempstead, HP2 4RQ. Henkel Ireland Distribution Limited, Dublin, D24 YH42. See more
